label: Ritual outcome comp (pawn stat scaled)
description: Applies a quality offset equal to the role pawn's stat value multiplied by scaledBy (optionally passed through a curve first).

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is the stat value * scaledBy (optionally curve-transformed).

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve applied to the stat value before multiplying by scaledBy.

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: Ritual role ID string identifying which pawn's stat to evaluate.

statDef.label: Stat def
statDef.description: StatDef read from the role pawn.

scaledBy.label: Scaled by
scaledBy.description: Multiplier applied to the stat value (or curve output) to produce the quality offset.
